changes: Day 34 updates: (1) NEW SHUTDOWN sd-024: Kuwait airport fuel tanks struck by IRGC drones Apr 1 — large fire, 58 hrs to extinguish, radar damaged, no casualties. (2) NEW EVENT: Bahrain national facility struck by Iranian aggression Apr 1 — fire controlled, no casualties. (3) Iran: Isfahan pharma/steel plants struck by US-Israeli forces Apr 1. (4) DIPLOMATIC: Trump says war could end in 2-3 weeks, no deal needed, tells allies 'go get your own oil'; Iran FM Araghchi: prepared for 6+ months, denies direct US negotiations. (5) MARKETS: Brent ~$115/bbl, WTI ~$103 (updated from $112/$102). (6) OPEC+ 206 kb/d increase now effective (symbolic). (7) Updated isNew flags across all events (>48h set to false). (8) Updated energy-news-data.json headlines for Kuwait, Iran, Bahrain, Saudi, US. No new FM declarations found in last 48 hours.
